settings.content:
The Colic Assurance Program offers customized wellness protocols and financial reimbursement for surgical and non-surgical colic-related expenses, providing peace of mind for horse owners. Qualified horses are eligible for up to $15,000 in lifetime reimbursement benefits.

The Assure System is a comprehensive digestive health solution offering unmatched, total digestive system support — designed by a team of veterinarians, nutritionists, and animal health specialists.

• Covers both surgical and non-surgical colic (unlike competitors)
  • No age restrictions; accepts horses with colic histories
  • Coverage: up to $15,000 in lifetime reimbursement benefits
  • Eligibility begins at weaning with no upper age limit

• Custom wellness programs
  • International travel coverage
  • Leased horse eligibility
  • No additional cost for eligible enrolled horses

1. Complete online enrollment form
  2. Receive confirmation email
  3. Get qualification notice within 5 business days
  4. Purchase initial products within 5 days of qualification
  5. Begin loading dose protocol

• Within 14 days: file claim initiation
  • Within 30 days: submit reimbursement forms from owner and veterinarians
  • Review and payment: decisions within 5 business days; payments within 10 business days
